en.description_en: A sakaki tree designated as a natural monument in the monuments category (historic sites, places of scenic beauty, and natural monuments). It is municipally designated by Akiruno City, Tokyo, with designation dated November 3, 1975. It is located at Sugao 1819.

items.name: 堀部家のイトヒバ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Itohiba Thread-Leaf Cypress of the Horibe Family Residence
en.description_en: An itohiba (thread-leaf cypress) designated as a natural monument in the monuments category (historic sites, places of scenic beauty, and natural monuments). It is municipally designated by Akiruno City, Tokyo, with designation dated November 3, 1975.

items.name: 小山家のツルウメモドキ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Oriental Bittersweet Vine of the Koyama Family Residence
en.description_en: A tsuruumemodoki (Oriental bittersweet) designated as a natural monument in the monuments category (historic sites, places of scenic beauty, and natural monuments). It is municipally designated by Akiruno City, Tokyo, with designation dated November 3, 1979.

items.name: 五柱神社のスギ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Cedar Tree of Gohashira Shrine
en.description_en: A sugi (Japanese cedar) tree designated as a natural monument in the monuments category (historic sites, places of scenic beauty, and natural monuments). It is municipally designated by Akiruno City, Tokyo, with designation dated July 23, 1997. It is located at Yōzawa 1392.

items.name: 山抱きの大カシ（ウラジロガシ）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Great Mountain-Embracing Oak (Urajirogashi Oak)
en.description_en: An urajirogashi oak designated as a natural monument in the monuments category (historic sites, places of scenic beauty, and natural monuments). It is municipally designated by Akiruno City, Tokyo, with designation dated March 26, 2013. It is located at Fukasawa 472.
